events.name: Boston Red Sox at Baltimore Orioles

headlines.description: — Willson Contreras hit his sixth home run of the season and second in as many games, and the Boston Red Sox responded to the firing of manager Alex...
headlines.shortLinkText: Contreras homers, Red Sox respond to Cora firing with 5-3 win over Orioles

headlines.description: — Chris Sale shut down the Phillies for the second time in nine days and won his 150th career game as the Atlanta Braves built an early lead and beat Philadelphia 6-2 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chris Sale works 6 shutout innings for 150th career win as Braves beat Phillies 6-2

events.name: Cleveland Guardians at Toronto Blue Jays

headlines.description: — Jesús Sánchez hit a two-run home run to take the lead, Vladimir Guerrero Jr. had three hits, and the Toronto Blue Jays beat the Cleveland Guardians 4-2 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jesús Sánchez has 2-run homer to give Blue Jays a 4-2 win over Guardians

events.name: Colorado Rockies at New York Mets

headlines.description: — Colorado avoided falling behind when the robot umpire changed Brett Baty's bases-loaded walk to an inning-ending called third strike in the first, and Jose Quintana got his first win of the season as the Rockies sent the New York Mets to their 14th...
headlines.shortLinkText: With help from robot umpire, Rockies beat Mets 3-1 for third series win, NY's 14th loss in 16 games

headlines.description: — Pinch hitter Hao-Yu Lee hit his first MLB home run and Spencer Torkelson homered for the fifth straight game as the Detroit Tigers avoided a series sweep with an 8-3 win over the Cincinnati Reds on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pinch hitter Hao-Yu Lee's first MLB homer helps Tigers to an 8-3 win over the Reds

events.name: Minnesota Twins at Tampa Bay Rays

headlines.description: — Yandy Diaz homered as part of a four-run third inning and the Tampa Bay Rays beat the Minnesota Twins 4-2 on Sunday to complete a three-game series sweep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yandy Diaz homers and Rays beat Twins 4-2

events.name: New York Yankees at Houston Astros

headlines.description: — Spencer Arrighetti allowed one run over seven innings, and Christian Walker homered and drove home a season-high four runs, and the Houston Astros beat New York 7-4 on Sunday to snap the Yankees' eight-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arrighetti allows 1 run in 7 innings, Walker has 4 RBIs; Astros beat Yankees 7-4

headlines.description: — Kyle Harrison collected a career-high 12 strikeouts and allowed just one hit and one walk in six scoreless innings as the Milwaukee Brewers avoided a sweep by beating the Pittsburgh Pirates 5-0 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kyle Harrison's gem enables Brewers to avoid sweep with 5-0 win over Pirates

events.name: Washington Nationals at Chicago White Sox

headlines.description: — CJ Abrams' sacrifice fly scored automatic runner Daylen Lile from third in the 10th inning, pinch-hitter José Tena followed with a solo homer and the Washington Nationals beat the Chicago White Sox 2-1 on Sunday for their second straight...
headlines.shortLinkText: Abrams' sacrifice fly, Tena's pinch-hit HR in the 10th lift Nationals over White Sox 2-1

events.name: Seattle Mariners at St. Louis Cardinals

headlines.description: — Rob Refsnyder successfully challenged a third strike, and then hit a go-ahead solo home run in the ninth inning to lift the Seattle Mariners to a 3-2 win against the St. Louis Cardinals on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Refsnyder successfully challenges 3rd strike, and then homers to lift Mariners over Cardinals 3-2

headlines.description: — Carlos Cortes had a two-run triple in the first inning, reliever Justin Sterner escaped a bases-loaded, no-out jam to preserve a one-run lead in the sixth and the Athletics beat the Texas Rangers 2-1 in the rubber game of their series Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Carlos Cortes triple and Justin Sterner's clutch pitching lift Athletics to 2-1 win over Rangers

events.name: Miami Marlins at San Francisco Giants

headlines.description: — Landen Roupp held Miami to two hits in 7 2/3 innings and Casey Schmitt hit a go-ahead home run for the second straight game as the San Francisco Giants beat the Marlins 6-3 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roupp's stellar pitching, Schmitt's 3-run homer propel Giants to 6-3 win over Marlins

events.name: San Diego Padres at Arizona Diamondbacks

notes.headline: MLB World Tour: Mexico City Series

headlines.description: — Tim Tawa hit a grand slam to highlight Arizona's six-run seventh inning, Ildemaro Vargas homered to extend his hitting streak to 23 games and the Diamondbacks rallied Sunday to defeat the San Diego Padres 12-7 and split the two-game series at...
headlines.shortLinkText: Tawa's slam helps Diamondbacks rally from 5-run deficit to beat Padres 12-7 in Mexico City

events.name: Los Angeles Angels at Kansas City Royals

headlines.description: — With runners on second and third, Lane Thomas delivered a three-run homer in the 10th inning to lift the Kansas City Royals over the Los Angeles Angels 11-9 and sweep the series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lane Thomas' 10th-inning homer leads Royals over Angels 11-9

events.name: Chicago Cubs at Los Angeles Dodgers

headlines.description: — Justin Wrobleski tossed six scoreless innings to become the first Dodgers pitcher since 2009 to win his first four starts, and Los Angeles defeated the Chicago Cubs 6-0 on Sunday in the series finale.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wrobleski dazzles with 6 scoreless innings, wins 4th straight start as Dodgers beat Cubs, 6-0

events.name: Colorado Rockies at New York Mets

headlines.description: — Chase Dollander held the Mets to five hits over seven innings in his first start this year, and the Colorado Rockies beat New York 3-0 in a doubleheader nightcap Sunday to complete a three-game sweep that sent the spiraling Mets to their 15th loss...
headlines.shortLinkText: Dollander leads Rockies to 3-0 win in nightcap for series sweep, dealing Mets 15th loss in 17 games
